name: Potato Stefado
recipeIngredient: 3 large Round red potatoes, cut into 1 1/2 inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Combine all ingredients in a flameproof casserole dish.
3. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Remove from heat and cover tightly with foil or lid.
5. Bake for 1 to 1 1/4 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Garnish each serving with crumbled Feta cheese, chopped parsley, and walnuts.
